aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
Recent activity has identified several new device fingerprints (FPs) that require integration into the Universal Tuya Zigbee app. The following FPs were found in issue [#182](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/182):

- **New FPs:**
  - `_TZ3000_dojqjapa`
  - `_TZ3000_icoxotza`
  - `_TZ3000_t7ugva7q`
  - `_TZ3000_uyrhiafs`
  - `_TZ3002_vsom92pp`
  - `_TZ3008_reatplte`
  - `_TZ3210_imaccztn`
  - `_TZ3210_vbfp8eyv`
  - `_TZ3210_zifx0xoj`
  - `_TZB210_qzsxaqqe`
  - `_TZE200_hbnfokum`
  - `_TZE200_w0ap83qu`
  - `_TZE204_cduqh1l0`
  - `_TZE204_ouy7vpm1`
  - `_TZE284_3regm3h6`
  - `_TZE284_4vbj3fxh`
  - `_TZE284_4vobcgd3`
  - `_TZE284_bw4ayyeh`
  - `_TZE284_mul9abs3`
  - `_TZE284_mvtclclq`
  - `_TZE284_nbv4tdaz`
  - `_TZE284_tgrzpqf4`

## Existing Fingerprints
The following fingerprints are already supported in the app, as noted in closed issues:

- **Existing FPs:**
  - `_TZ3002_jn2x20tg` (Drivers: switch_1gang) - [Issue #171](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/171)
  - `_TZE284_oitavov2` (Drivers: soil_sensor) - [Issue #172](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/172)
  - `_TZ3000_kxaow5ki` (Drivers: button_wireless_1) - [Issue #167](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/167)
  - `_TZ3000_otvn3lne` (Drivers: motion_sensor) - [Issue #164](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/164)
  - `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (Drivers: fingerbot) - [Issue #161](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/161)
  - `_TZ3000_7y90pany` (Drivers: climate_sensor) - [Issue #165](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)
  - `_TZE284_hdml1aav` (Drivers: soil_sensor) - [Issue #176](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/176)
  - `_TZE284_oitavov2` (Drivers: soil_sensor) - [Issue #178](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/178)
  - `_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp` (Drivers: switch_3gang) - [Issue #170](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
From the forked repository `JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee`, the following fingerprints are available for potential integration:

- **Forked FPs:**
  - `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (Drivers: switch_2gang)
  - `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (Drivers: switch_3gang, switch_4gang) - [Issue #1337](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)

## PRs with Useful Changes
Several pull requests (PRs) have been submitted that may enhance the app's functionality:

- **Closed PRs:**
  - [#180](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180): Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices (FPs: `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa`, `_TZE204_qasjif9e`)
  - [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166): Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 (FP: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`)

- **Open PRs:**
  - [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350): Added TS110E driver (FPs: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`)
  - [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253): Added 3 new devices (FPs: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`)
  - [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219): Update driver.compose.json (FP: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments and contributions to the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting areas for potential integration and enhancement.
